title: gutierrezia mandonii subsp. gilliesii
intro: Gutierrezia mandonii subsp. gilliesii, also known as a type of bushy shrub belonging to the sunflower family, is native to the Andes region in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties that can aid in the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, Gutierrezia mandonii subsp. gilliesii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
